channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Florida airport officially renamed for Trump. What does he gain?
item.description: Trump is the first president to have an airport named after him while in office; he will not receive royalties.

item.title: New aviation mechanics graduate with jobs due to labor shortage
item.description: Aviation is booming with record passengers, but a retiring generation of mechanics creates high demand for new hires.

item.title: Bonnie Tyler, singer of 'Total Eclipse of the Heart,' dies at 75
item.description: Tyler died unexpectedly in a Portuguese hospital while being treated for an illness, her family announced.

item.title: Campaign staff continue attempting to bet on races despite efforts to curb insider trading
item.description: Kalshi says it has blocked dozens of trades from campaign insiders, but experts note the company's approach leaves many potential loopholes. NPR h...
